rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to allege tender or exception to tender rule and to allege facts showing plaintiff's prejudice by imperfections in closing process. See Fontenot (2011) 198CA4 256, 272. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION TO STRIKE First AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant without leave to amend as to reference to Request for Judicial Notice: deposition of Beth Cottrell CCP 2025.620(g) and Evidence Code 452(d)(2). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KABITA CHOUDHURI VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Issues have been previously decided by USDC and Marin Superior Court i.e. Res Judicata. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ENVIRONMENT AND LAND MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GERALD R. GREENE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENT AND LAND MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 21, 2012 at 9:30AM. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B tofile courtsey copy of initial papers with court no later than September 19, 2012 noon. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CEAMON RHODES et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion To File Records Under Seal. Grant - Moving party admits error in timely dismissal. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAM HUNT VS. PETER DOTY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT PETER DOTY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant, 3 day notice of July 13, 2012 premature. Increase effective July 15, 2012. See Exhibit A Defendant's Declaration (Rent Increase); Exhibit 2 to Complaint (3 Day Notice to Pay) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAM HUNT VS. PETER DOTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Sancxtions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT PETER DOTY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions. Grant - Discovery timely and no responses and no meet and confer plus attorney fees of $877.50. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAMIRO S. GARCIA VS. FELICITA BRAVO
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 19, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT FELICITA BRAVO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant with leave to amend to allege damages from date after expiration of notice. = (501/REQ)
